title: Creatify [Discontinued]
body:
# Creatify
Creatify is a in alpha modpack that smashes all of Create addons into one single, quite small pack that has you lasting hours. 
### Fabric Roots
Suprisingly, this pack is made with Fabric and not Forge, for version 1.20.1 meaning you get updates fast, stable performance, faster load times and more compatibility.
### QuestCraft Compatibility
This has QCXR compatibility if you install ViveCraft Mod Compat mod.
### Server Compatibility
Making servers is quite easy, a mod install with some configs, then you are ready.
### Extremely fast
Using Overly Optmized 1.20.1M as its backbone, it is very fast.

***NOTE***
SinglePlayer Worlds will spam logs until it loads up the world which may take a while, to remove this, remove the ModernFix config, but expect degrated performance.
